title: InferCept — KV Cache Preserve for Tool Calls
summary_zh: 引入更簡單的「preserve」操作，在 tool call 之間釘選 KV cache。後續工作（Continuum、KVFlow、ThunderAgent）指出關鍵限制：靜態 pin 策略在高變異性工具呼叫時失敗——長時間或失敗的呼叫無限期阻塞 GPU 記憶體。
summary_en: Introduces the simpler "preserve" operation, pinning KV cache between tool calls. Subsequent work (Continuum, KVFlow, ThunderAgent) identifies a key limitation: static pin policies fail under high-variance tool calls -- long or failed calls block GPU memory indefinitely.
